sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ الْمُوَاطِنُونَ الْأَخْبَارَ الْعَالَمِيَّةَ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Građani čitaju svjetske vijesti putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens read international news via the internet.

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الْمَعْلُومَاتُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي الْفَضَاءِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Informacije se šire veoma brzo u digitalnom prostoru.
sentences.translationEn: Information spreads very quickly in digital space.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je provjeriti izvor vijesti prije njenog objavljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to verify the source of the news before publishing it.
